mainEntity.name: Does it matter that my forklift accident happened in Texas instead of Utah? Are the laws different?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, laws vary significantly. Texas allows some employers to opt out of workers comp, potentially allowing for a direct lawsuit. Colorado has strict penalties for safety violations that could cut benefits in half. Our firm navigates these specific state rules.
